title: Resume Parsing Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Resume Parsing Tools, helping staffing agencies parse resumes efficiently.
content:
Resume Parsing Overview

Resume parsing is important for staffing agencies to extract candidate data from resumes. Staffing agencies need resume parsing tools including data extraction, format parsing, profile creation. Resume parsing tools help agencies achieve data extraction, format parsing, profile creation.

Platform Reviews

Sovren Resume Parsing

Sovren provides professional resume parsing platform. Data extraction features extract candidate data. Format parsing features parse resume formats. Profile creation features create candidate profiles.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting resume parsing tools should focus on data extraction, format parsing, profile creation, and cost structure.
author: Resume Parsing Research Institute
